title: A2-L4 Planner Output Contract
description: Inert, read-only planner-output contract for the A2-L4 read-only local-model task planner. A conforming document is well-formed and inert; conformance is necessary for well-formedness and never sufficient for action. The schema validates shape only: it does not grant write, approve, or apply authority, and it carries no executable command, approval line, raw localhost:11434 endpoint, or secret. The A2-L2b preview/approve/apply chain remains the only write authority. Value-level checks (workspace-relative path/no-escape, :11434 URL refusal, secret/token pattern refusal) are performed by the separately-scoped read-only validator lane, not by this schema.

schema_version.description: Pinned contract version literal. Consumers reject any output whose schema_version is not a known value. A breaking change to the field sets, semantics, or constraints requires a new literal and a scope-card amendment.

task_id.description: Opaque identifier for the planning task. Inert text.

workspace_root.description: Workspace root path the plan is scoped to. A path string; the validator lane enforces workspace-relative, no-path-escape semantics.

task_summary.description: Descriptive summary of the task. Inert text, never a command.

plan_steps.description: Ordered, inert, descriptive plan steps. Each step is descriptive text, never an argv/command structure.

risk_notes.description: Inert descriptive risk notes for operator review. Arrays of text, not command structures.

operator_next_steps.description: Inert descriptive next steps the operator may consider. Arrays of text, never executable invocations.

repo_context_summary.description: Optional inert summary of repository context the planner read. Descriptive text only.

candidate_files.description: Optional list of candidate file paths the operator may inspect. Path strings; the validator lane enforces workspace-relative, no-path-escape semantics.

test_suggestions.description: Optional inert test suggestions for operator review. May name tests or suggest commands as descriptive text; never structured as an executable runner and never auto-executed.

not.description: Explicit forbidden top-level field intent. These names are rejected both here and by the closed-object (additionalProperties:false) policy. They would carry execution, approval, routing-bypass, or secret payloads, which a planner output must never express.

planStep.description: A single inert, descriptive plan step. Closed object: descriptive text only, no command/argv structure.

patchIntent.description: Inert prose/structured notes describing intended edits and why. NOT a patch file and NOT an applyable artifact: it must not carry an applyable diff or a staged file-replacement body. Closed object so no replacement/diff/content payload can be smuggled.

previewRequest.description: An inert request for the operator (or a future, separately authorized A2-integration lane) to consider running a preview. It is not, and must not contain or template, a run of claw plan run or any chain command, a generated preview artifact, or an approval line. Closed object so no command/artifact/approval payload can be smuggled.

externalVerifierHandoff.description: Operator-gated, secret-free review input for an optional external verifier (ChatGPT/Claude). Advisory only: it grants no write authority and is not an authority field. Must not contain secrets, token values, env secrets, or private keys. Closed object so no secret-bearing field can be smuggled.

statusSnapshot.description: Optional inert summary of a2-l2d-status.v1 read-only plan status. No authority; descriptive text only. Closed object.
